name: Garuda Prime
description: White, gold and deepest scarlet, the queen of gore in full regalia.
passiveDescription:
Garuda's damage temporarily increases with each enemy she kills, to a maximum of |DAMAGE|%. 
Slashes with her talons if no melee weapon is equipped.

abilities.name: Dread Mirror
abilities.description: Rip the life force from an enemy and use it as a shield that captures damage, this kills significantly weakened enemies instantly. Charge to channel the captured damage into an explosive projectile.

abilities.name: Blood Altar
abilities.description: Impale an enemy on an altar of talons and siphon health for Garuda and her allies.

abilities.name: Bloodletting
abilities.description: Garuda sacrifices her health to generate energy and clear Status Effects.

abilities.name: Seeking Talons
abilities.description: Charge to expand the targeting area, release to send Garuda's talons careening toward each target in area. Surviving enemies are prone to <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Status.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: White, gold and deepest scarlet, the queen of gore in full regalia.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Garuda Prime Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Garuda Prime Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Garuda Prime Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Garuda’s Blood Altar

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Garuda's Blending Talons Augment not triggering when hitting an enemy with Overguard is affected by a Slash Status Effect.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being unable to use Garuda’s Claws on Railjack after dying in Archwing.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.changes:
Garuda’s Blending Talons augment
Garuda’s Dread Mirror now blocks all radial damage in front of it and grants stagger/knockdown immunity.

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.10 + 31.5.10.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Garuda’s Seeking Talons HUD showing up when in Operator if cast while entering anti-Warframe area. 
Fixed Garuda’s Bloodletting not granting Energy.

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error related to Garuda’s Seeking Talons during Host migration.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a spike on Garuda's Ephemera that lacked symmetry. As reported here: https://www.reddit.com/r/Warframe/comments/uf561f/intentional_or_lazy_design/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=ios_app&utm_name=iossmf

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes: Garuda’s Seeking Talons
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Garuda/Garuda Prime’s Talon colors not being saved in other Appearance Slots other than A. 
Fixed Garuda/Garuda Prime’s passive damage boost values in HUD alternating between other squad members also playing as her, resulting in incorrect values. 
Fixed Garuda Prime’s Dread Mirror losing all its Prime details if it expires while still having the projectile active.
Fixed Garuda’s Ability description appearing outside text box when viewing in German.
Fixed script error related to Garuda’s Seeking Talons.

patchlogs.name: Garuda Prime: Hotfix 31.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Garuda Prime: Hotfix 31.3.1:
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed inability to use Garuda’s Talons if a Host migration occurred. 
Fixed Garuda Talons moving when hovering on/off color swatches in the Arsenal.
Fixed Garuda Prime’s rear skirt cloth clipping through some Syandanas.

patchlogs.name: Garuda Prime: Update 31.3
patchlogs.changes:
Garuda Prime: Update 31.3:
Awash in crimson and shimmering gold, Garuda Prime has emerged! Add Garuda Prime, exclusive Prime Accessories, Weapons, Boosters and more with Prime Access, or earn Relics in-game to craft Garuda Prime, Nagantaka Prime and Corvas Prime in your Foundry.
Garuda Prime and her signature Prime gear tear through the battlefield with razor-sharp talons and sanguine bloodletting. Experience Garuda’s reworked abilities and witness the queen of gore get deadlier the more blood is spilled.
When Garuda Prime enters Prime Access, the following items will be added to the Prime Vault. If you have Relics that contain these items they will remain in your Inventory.
Note on Garuda Prime Relics: We have skipped Neo N19 in Relic naming convention and went straight to Neo N20 due to chat linking issues we encountered in testing.
Garuda Prime Access begins March 28 on all platforms. Don’t miss out on adding the queen of gore’s full regalia to your Arsenal! Find the Prime Access packs here: https://www.warframe.com/prime-access
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Garuda Talons not retaining skin details/textures in Arsenal preview. 
Fixed Garuda's Seeking Talons UI getting stuck on screen after falling into a teleport volume while casting it.

patchlogs.name: Nora's Mix Volume 1: Hotfix 31.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda’s new passive HUD icon losing its damage buff status while active after Transferring to Operator and back.

patchlogs.name: Nora's Mix Volume 1: Update 31.2.0 + 31.2.0.1
patchlogs.changes:
Garuda will now be invulnerable while traveling to the target. 
Garuda will now be invulnerable while traveling to the target.
Slightly increased Energy gain from 35% to 40% of Garuda’s Energy pool.
Garuda is now invulnerable while casting Seeking Talons until it is fully charged.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Garuda’s Talons not retaining Skin details/textures outside of the Orbiter. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1240713-garuda-talon-skins-not-showing/#comment-11971610
Also fixed her Talons not retaining skin details/textures in the preview of Garuda in the Arsenal. 
Fixed previewing Garuda skins in the Arsenal not updating her Talons until you equip the skin.
Fixed Garuda’s left hand Talon not using the proper animations for many abilities and idle animations. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1286041-suspected-script-error-with-garudas-talons-animation/#comment-12330935
Fixed the ‘unkillable’ VFX on Garuda missing for Clients when she kills an enemy with Dread Ward equipped. 
Fixed script error with Garuda’s Dread Mirror.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda’s Blood Altar affecting Conservation targets.

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda’s Blending Talons Augment Mod not hitting enemies behind you in the Range indicated.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.5 + 29.5.5.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a crash when Garuda activates her Bloodletting ability. 
Fixed a script error that could occur when using a Garuda Specter.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ‘[PH] Mod Combo Count Chance’ appearing for Garuda’s Blending Talons Augment.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes: Tap to perform a *9m AoE around Garuda. Garuda’s Talons gain 100% additional Combo Count Chance when hitting targets affected by Bleed Status.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Gladiator Mods (Vice, Might, Rush) not stacking or applying the increased set bonus to Critical Chance per combo multiplier when they are applied to Garuda's Talons (only applies when Talons are the single equipped Melee).
Fixed Blood Rush and Weeping Wounds not applying to Garuda’s Talons (only applies when Talons are the single equipped Melee).

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: TennoGen: 29.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Garuda Tengushin Skin by Lubox

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda’s Dread Mirror Damage Capture Multiplier/Projectile Damage not matching ability screen numbers in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.8 + 29.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda’s Talons not being visible on the End of Mission screen.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ragdolling enemies not taking additional Slash Status from being hit while debuffed by Garuda’s Seeking Talons.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.changes: Slight reduction to Elemental FX on Garuda’s Talons.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Hotfix 27.4.3
patchlogs.changes: Stance Forma is now eligible to be installed on Garuda’s Talons due to the Talons using standard Stance Mods instead of an Exalted Stance.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Hotfix 27.4.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda not being able to Melee after leaving and re-entering Railjacks.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes:
Garuda 
You can now sell your duplicate Garuda, Harrow, Octavia, Revenant, and Nidus Blueprints for 2500 Credits from your Inventory.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error related to Garuda’s Talons.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.10
patchlogs.changes: Updated the Garuda Sakhura Helmet to better match the reflectivity of the body.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.8 + 27.3.8.1 + 27.3.8.2
patchlogs.changes:
Garuda Tiamat Skin by Vulbjorn, the graphical walrus.
Garuda Sakhura Helmet by kakarrot2812

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed enemies marked by Garuda’s Seeking Talons not being prone to receiving a Slash Status Effect.
Fixed Garuda appearing to hold all Melee weapons in a fisticufs style when viewed in the Market.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Slightly increased the size of Garuda’s Dread Mirror shield.
We noticed that enemies were still able to shoot Garuda’s feet, so this increase is to help avoid those stray foot bullets.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Kuva Lich Changes 27.1.0 + 27.1.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda charging her Dread Heart at full strength from any amount of Energy regen.

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Update 26.1
patchlogs.changes:
Added a projectile explosion range FX to Garuda’s Dread Mirror blood projectile for the local player (one doing the casting) so you can see your output.
Fixed motion blur on Garuda's Dread Mirror.

patchlogs.name: Arbitrations Revisited: Hotfix 25.7.6
patchlogs.changes: Ally NPCs will no longer attack Garuda’s Blood Atlar Victims.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda’s Talons not using the proper textures for Clients with the Garuda Successor Skin equipped as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1077278-garuda-successor-talon-texture-defaulting-to-original-textures-as-client/

patchlogs.name: Wukong Deluxe: Hotfix 25.5.1 + 25.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Clients able to cast Warframe Abilities that require no Energy (Garuda’s Bloodletting) after dying/respawning in the Dog Days Tactical Alert.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Deluxe: Update 25.5.0 + 25.5.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda’s Arsenal Ability UI displaying Health Drain is modified by Power Efficiency.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Prime: Hotfix 25.3.2 + 25.3.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a Host migration causing Garuda’s Talons to lose their Stance upgrade, and instead use the default attacks if it’s the only Melee weapon equipped.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Prime: Update 25.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ‘Auto Installing’ Mods on Garuda's Talons with no Stance Mods resulting in 15 error popups.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda’s Dread Mirror duration not refreshing after re-casting.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed typo in Garuda’s Dread Mirror Arsenal stats.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda having negative Mod capacity by replacing a Stance Mod with high drain with a Stance Mod of low drain.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Garuda Blueprint

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Hildryn and Garuda Specters never using Abilities.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Dispatch Overdrive not applying to Garuda’s Talons when equipped (this time without breaking all Arcanes).

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Garuda’s Passive reading as 101% when bleeding out.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Garuda Successor Skin not applying to her Talons.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.5.0
patchlogs.changes: Dispatch Overdrive now applies to Garuda’s Talons when equipped.
patchlogs.fixes: Garuda Successor Skin by prosetisen

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.4.4 + 24.4.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Garuda’s Blood Altar ability.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes:
Respective Ability videos now also appear upon hover-over to add that little extra spice! This initial Ability video aspect is currently functional for Excalibur, Mag, Volt, Garuda, Baruuk, Revenant, and Hildryn! More to gradually come!
Changed Garuda’s FX to green ooze and other particles for Tenno with Gore disabled.
Dispatch Overdrive now applies to Garuda’s Talons when equipped.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.12
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Garuda’s Blood Altar ability.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being able to equip Stance Mods in any slot and any Mod in the Stance slot for Garuda Talons and unequip Mods that break these rules.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Upgrade screen breaking for Garuda's Talons and Mesa's Regulators if you click the Mods button and back out.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Clients in the Simulacrum seeing Talons on other Warframes when Garuda is equipped and previewing others.
Fixed Garuda's arm cloth clipping through the Abrasys Syandana.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.3 + 24.1.3.1
patchlogs.changes:
Capped Garuda's Dread Mirror and Blood Altar dashes to 150m/s max. No more going going 42km/s anymore.
Fixed delay between the end of Garuda's Seeking Talons release animation and being able to charge her Dread Mirror.
Fixed a crash while Garuda siphons blood. 
Fixed Garuda Dread Mirror failing to cast because of TARGET OBSTRUCTED when the leap into the air would clear whatever obstruction was blocking her.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.2 + 24.1.2.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a non-functional Garuda Blood Altar being left behind if used on a detonating Volatile Runner.
Fixed a script error when casting Garuda’s Dread Mirror.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.1.0 - TennoGen Round 14
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Terra Provisors being able to damage you through Garuda’s Dread Mirror.
Fixed a game hitch when loading into a Relay/Town as Garuda.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.9
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Garuda’s Dread Mirror blood projectile damage indicator disappearing if the player Transfers to Operator and back.
Fixed Garuda’s Dread Mirror blood projectile outright killing Vomvalysts, as opposed to creating a “ghost” on death.
Fixed Garuda’s Seeking Talons HUD indicator being incorrectly affected by HUD Scale.
Fixed a script error when casting Garuda’s Blood Altar ability.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.7
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Submersible Archwing disabling Garuda’s Talons.
Fixed Garuda's Talons not distinguishing the Stance slot when Polarizing/swapping.
Fixed Garuda’s Dread Mirror not functioning properly when using a controller with activate selected power button or "classic controls".
Fixed "COPY MAIN COLORS" for Attachments when using Garuda and having a normal Melee weapon equipped filling the first three color slots as grey.
Fixed a script error when casting Garuda’s Blood Altar ability.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Natural Talent Mod now applies to Garuda’s Dread Mirror and Seeking Talons ability.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Garuda’s Animation Sets not being available for purchase.
Fixed Garuda’s Talons sometimes appearing motion blurred.
Fixes towards wonky appearing Elemental FX on Garuda’s Idle animation.
Fixed the Abrasys Syandana clipping through Garuda's arm cloth.
Fixed script error when casting any of Garuda’s abilities.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a bug that could leave invincible enemies from Garuda’s Blood Altar that would prevent things like Defense missions from progressing.
Fixed a script error when casting Garuda’s Seeking Talon ability.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.changes:
As Garuda nears death, her damage increases.
Garuda can be acquired via Orb Vallis Bounties & the Vox Solaris Quest, or in the Market for Platinum.
Find the Bloodshed Sigil in the Market as part of the Garuda Bundle. You will be able to earn it free in a future Fortuna release
